name: parakeet-cpp
description: Parakeet (NVIDIA FastConformer ASR + Sortformer diarization) inference in pure C++/ggml. Ships CTC, TDT, EOU and Sortformer engines under one Engine umbrella, plus the Phase 13 cross-engine StreamEvent API (VadStateChanged / EndOfTurn).

vulkan.description: Enable Vulkan GPU acceleration. Requires a host Vulkan SDK at build time (e.g. LunarG SDK on Windows, libvulkan-dev on Linux, the Vulkan headers shipped with the Android NDK).
